---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for agentflt
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Use Case

Explain the problem this feature would solve or the workflow it would improve.

**Example:**
"As a developer running multiple AI agents, I want to [do something] so that [benefit]."

## Proposed Solution

How do you envision this feature working?

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds?

## Additional Context

- Would this be useful for most users or a niche use case?
- Any UI mockups, examples, or references from other tools?
- Related to any existing issues or roadmap items?

## Roadmap

Check if this is already planned in [ROADMAP.md](https://github.com/cabaret-pro/agentflt/blob/main/docs/ROADMAP.md).
